'''kowamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:stabby|stabby]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stabby|stabby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kowamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kowamithi|kowamithi]] || [[word:kowamiji|kowamiji]] || [[word:kowamishi|kowamishi]] || [[word:kowamiki|kowamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kowamuthuthu|kowamuthuthu]] || [[word:kowamujuju|kowamujuju]] || [[word:kowamushushu|kowamushushu]] || [[word:kowamukuku|kowamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kowamuthu|kowamuthu]] || [[word:kowamuju|kowamuju]] || [[word:kowamushu|kowamushu]] || [[word:kowamuku|kowamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kowamufthuf|kowamufthuf]] || [[word:kowamufjuf|kowamufjuf]] || [[word:kowamufshuf|kowamufshuf]] || [[word:kowamufkuf|kowamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kowamethe|kowamethe]] || [[word:kowameje|kowameje]] || [[word:kowameshe|kowameshe]] || [[word:kowameke|kowameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kowamothotho|kowamothotho]] || [[word:kowamojojo|kowamojojo]] || [[word:kowamoshosho|kowamoshosho]] || [[word:kowamokoko|kowamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kowamotho|kowamotho]] || [[word:kowamojo|kowamojo]] || [[word:kowamosho|kowamosho]] || [[word:kowamoko|kowamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kowamofthof|kowamofthof]] || [[word:kowamofjof|kowamofjof]] || [[word:kowamofshof|kowamofshof]] || [[word:kowamofkof|kowamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfthÃŸf|kowamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfjÃŸf|kowamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfshÃŸf|kowamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfkÃŸf|kowamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kowamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kowamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kowamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kowamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfthÃŸf|kowamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfjÃŸf|kowamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfshÃŸf|kowamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfkÃŸf|kowamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfthÃŸf|kowamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfjÃŸf|kowamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfshÃŸf|kowamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kowamÃŸfkÃŸf|kowamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kowamÃḊthÃḊ|kowamÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kowamÃḊjÃḊ|kowamÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kowamÃḊshÃḊ|kowamÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kowamÃḊkÃḊ|kowamÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kowamathatha|kowamathatha]] || [[word:kowamajaja|kowamajaja]] || [[word:kowamashasha|kowamashasha]] || [[word:kowamakaka|kowamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kowamatha|kowamatha]] || [[word:kowamaja|kowamaja]] || [[word:kowamasha|kowamasha]] || [[word:kowamaka|kowamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kowamafthaf|kowamafthaf]] || [[word:kowamafjaf|kowamafjaf]] || [[word:kowamafshaf|kowamafshaf]] || [[word:kowamafkaf|kowamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kowamasha|kowamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kowamshÃḋsha|kowamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kowamrosha|kowamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kowamusha|kowamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kowamyasha|kowamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokowamnkshÃḋsha|gokowamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokowamnkrosha|gokowamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokowamnkmusha|gokowamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokowamnkyasha|gokowamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kowawamasha|kowawamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kowawamshÃḋsha|kowawamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kowawamrosha|kowawamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kowawamusha|kowawamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kowawamyasha|kowawamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokowawamnkshÃḋsha|gokowawamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokowawamnkrosha|gokowawamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokowawamnkmusha|gokowawamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokowawamnkyasha|gokowawamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kewÃḊmasha|kewÃḊmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kewÃḊmshÃḋsha|kewÃḊmshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kewÃḊmrosha|kewÃḊmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kewÃḊmusha|kewÃḊmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kewÃḊmyasha|kewÃḊmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokewÃḊmnkshÃḋsha|gokewÃḊmnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokewÃḊmnkrosha|gokewÃḊmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokewÃḊmnkmusha|gokewÃḊmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokewÃḊmnkyasha|gokewÃḊmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kowfamasha|kowfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kowfamshÃḋsha|kowfamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kowfamrosha|kowfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kowfamusha|kowfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kowfamyasha|kowfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokowfamnkshÃḋsha|gokowfamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokowfamnkrosha|gokowfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokowfamnkmusha|gokowfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokowfamnkyasha|gokowfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
